question: What is the unabbreviated mailing street address of the school with the highest FRPM count for K-12 students?
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.MailingStreet FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.`Free Meal Count (K-12)` = ( SELECT MAX(`Free Meal Count (K-12)` ) FROM frpm )
gold_sql: SELECT T2.MailStreet FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode ORDER BY T1.`FRPM Count (K-12)` DESC LIMIT 1

question: For the school with the highest average score in Reading in the SAT test, what is its FRPM count for students aged 5-17?
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.FRPM_COUNT FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.rtype = 'Reading' ORDER BY T1.AvgScrRead DESC LIMIT 1
gold_sql: SELECT T2.`FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)` FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode ORDER BY T1.AvgScrRead DESC LIMIT 1

question: Among the schools with an SAT excellence rate of over 0.3, what is the highest eligible free rate for students aged 5-17?
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` / T2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE T2.NumGE1500 / T2.NumTstTakr > 0.3 ORDER BY T2.`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` / T2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` DESC LIMIT 1
gold_sql: SELECT MAX(CAST(T1.`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` AS REAL) / T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE CAST(T2.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / T2.NumTstTakr > 0.3

question: List the top five schools, by descending order, from the highest to the lowest, the most number of Enrollment (Ages 5-17). Please give their NCES school identification number.
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.NCESchool, T1.Enrollment FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode ORDER BY T1.Enrollment DESC LIMIT 5
gold_sql: SELECT T1.NCESSchool FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode ORDER BY T2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` DESC LIMIT 5

question: Give the names of the schools with the percent eligible for free meals in K-12 is more than 0.1 and test takers whose test score is greater than or equal to 1500?
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.School, T2.NumTstTakr FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE T2.NumTstTakr >= 1500 AND CAST(T2.Free Meal Count (K-12) AS REAL) / T1.Enrollment (K-12) > 0.1
gold_sql: SELECT T2.`School Name` FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE CAST(T2.`Free Meal Count (K-12)` AS REAL) / T2.`Enrollment (K-12)` > 0.1 AND T1.NumGE1500 > 0

question: Consider the average difference between K-12 enrollment and 15-17 enrollment of schools that are locally funded, list the names and DOC type of schools which has a difference above this average.
predicted_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.`School Name`, T1.DOCType FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` > ( SELECT AVG(T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.FundingType = 'Local' )
gold_sql: SELECT T2.School, T2.DOC FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.FundingType = 'Locally funded' AND (T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > (SELECT AVG(T3.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T3.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) FROM frpm AS T3 INNER JOIN schools AS T4 ON T3.CDSCode = T4.CDSCode WHERE T4.FundingType = 'Locally funded')

question: What is the eligible free or reduced price meal rate for the top 5 schools in grades 1-12 with the highest free or reduced price meal count of the schools with the ownership code 66?
predicted_sql: SELECT CAST(T1.`FRPM Count (K-12)` AS REAL) / T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.OwnershipCode = 66 ORDER BY T1.`FRPM Count (K-12)` DESC LIMIT 5
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(T1.`FRPM Count (K-12)` AS REAL) / T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.SOC = 66 ORDER BY T1.`FRPM Count (K-12)` DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the names of virtual schools that are among the top 5 in their respective counties based on average reading scores.
predicted_sql: SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN Virtual = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) > 5 THEN County ELSE NULL END AS county FROM satscores GROUP BY County ORDER BY COUNT(CASE WHEN Virtual = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) DESC LIMIT 5
gold_sql: SELECT School FROM (SELECT T2.School,T1.AvgScrRead, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY T2.County ORDER BY T1.AvgScrRead DESC) AS rnk FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.Virtual = 'F' ) ranked_schools WHERE rnk <= 5

question: What is the average math score of the school with the lowest average score for all subjects, and in which county is it located?
predicted_sql: SELECT AVG(AvgScrMath + AvgScrRead + AvgScrWrite), T2.County FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode GROUP BY T1.cds ORDER BY SUM(AvgScrMath + AvgScrRead + AvgScrWrite) ASC LIMIT 1
gold_sql: SELECT T1.AvgScrMath, T2.County FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.AvgScrMath IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.AvgScrMath + T1.AvgScrRead + T1.AvgScrWrite ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the ratio of merged Unified School District schools in Orange County to merged Elementary School District schools?
predicted_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.DOC = 54 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.DOC = 52 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN DOC = 54 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN DOC = 52 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM schools WHERE StatusType = 'Merged' AND County = 'Orange'

question: What is the postal street address for the school with the 7th highest Math average? Indicate the school's name.
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.postalStreet, T1.school FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE T2.rtype = 'Math' ORDER BY T2.AvgScrMath DESC LIMIT 7
gold_sql: SELECT T2.MailStreet, T2.School FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode ORDER BY T1.AvgScrMath DESC LIMIT 6, 1

question: In which mailing street address can you find the school that has the lowest average score in reading? Also give the school's name.
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.MailingStreet, T2.School FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE T2.rtype = 'Reading' ORDER BY T2.AvgScrRead LIMIT 1
gold_sql: SELECT T2.MailStreet, T2.School FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.AvgScrRead ASC LIMIT 1

question: Please specify all of the schools and their related mailing zip codes that are under Avetik Atoian's administration.
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.NCESchool, T1.Zip FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.DOC = 'Avetik Atoian'
gold_sql: SELECT School, MailZip FROM schools WHERE AdmFName1 = 'Avetik' AND AdmLName1 = 'Atoian'

question: Of the schools with a mailing state address in California, what is the ratio of the schools located in the county of Colusa against the school located in the county of Humboldt?
predicted_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.County = 'Colusa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.County = 'Humboldt' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN County = 'Colusa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN County = 'Humboldt' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM schools WHERE MailState = 'CA'

question: Which county reported the most number of school closure in the 1980s with school wonership code belonging to Youth Authority Facilities (CEA)?
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.County FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.SOC = 11 AND T2.`Year` BETWEEN 1980 AND 1989 GROUP BY T2.County ORDER BY COUNT(T2.County) DESC LIMIT 1
gold_sql: SELECT County FROM schools WHERE strftime('%Y', ClosedDate) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1989' AND StatusType = 'Closed' AND SOC = 11 GROUP BY County ORDER BY COUNT(School) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the district code for the School that does not offer a magnet program in the city of Fresno?
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.DistrictCode FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.Magnet = 0 AND T2.City = 'Fresno'
gold_sql: SELECT T1.`District Code` FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.City = 'Fresno' AND T2.Magnet = 0

question: What is the lowest grade for the District Special Education Consortia School with National Center for Educational Statistics school district identification number of 0613360?
predicted_sql: SELECT MIN(`Low Grade`) FROM frpm WHERE `District Code` = 613360 AND EdOpsCode = 'SPECON'
gold_sql: SELECT MIN(T1.`Low Grade`) FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.NCESDist = '0613360' AND T2.EdOpsCode = 'SPECON'

question: Which schools served a grade span of Kindergarten to 9th grade in the county of Los Angeles and what is its Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)?
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.`County Name`, CAST(T2.`FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)` AS REAL) * 100 / T2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.`CDSCode` = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.`County Name` = 'Los Angeles' AND T1.`Low Grade` = 'Kindergarten' AND T1.`High Grade` = '9th'
gold_sql: SELECT T2.School, T1.`FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)` * 100 / T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.County = 'Los Angeles' AND T2.GSserved = 'K-9'

question: What is the school type of the school with the highest latitude? Indicate the name of the school as well as the latitude coordinates.
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.`School Type`, T1.Latitude FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode ORDER BY T1.Latitude DESC LIMIT 1
gold_sql: SELECT T1.`School Type`, T1.`School Name`, T2.Latitude FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode ORDER BY T2.Latitude DESC LIMIT 1

question: In which city can you find the school in the state of California with the lowest latitude coordinates and what is its lowest grade? Indicate the school name.
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.City, T1.LastUpdate, T1.Latitude, T1.LowGrade FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.state = 'CA' ORDER BY T1.Latitude LIMIT 1
gold_sql: SELECT T2.City, T1.`Low Grade`, T1.`School Name` FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.State = 'CA' ORDER BY T2.Latitude ASC LIMIT 1

question: What are the valid e-mail addresses of the administrator of the school located in the San Bernardino county, City of San Bernardino City Unified that opened between 1/1/2009 to 12/31/2010 whose school types are public Intermediate/Middle Schools and Unified Schools?
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.AdmEmail1 FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.County = 'San Bernardino County' AND T1.City = 'San Bernardino City Unified' AND T1.SOC = 62 AND T1.DOC = 54 AND T1.OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'
gold_sql: SELECT T2.AdmEmail1, T2.AdmEmail2 FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.County = 'San Bernardino' AND T2.City = 'San Bernardino' AND T2.DOC = 54 AND strftime('%Y', T2.OpenDate) BETWEEN '2009' AND '2010' AND T2.SOC = 62

question: What is the administrator's email address for the school with the highest number of test takers who received SAT scores of at least 1500?Provide the name of the school.
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.School, T2.AdmEmail1 FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE T2.NumTstTakr >= 1500 ORDER BY T2.NumTstTakr DESC LIMIT 1
gold_sql: SELECT T2.AdmEmail1, T2.School FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode ORDER BY T1.NumGE1500 DESC LIMIT 1

question: How many races in the year 2010 are held on grand prixs outside Asia and Europe?
predicted_sql: SELECT COUNT(raceId) FROM races WHERE year = 2010 AND (country = 'Asia' OR country = 'Europe')
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T3.raceId) FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T3.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T1.country NOT IN ( 'Bahrain', 'China', 'Singapore', 'Japan', 'Korea', 'Turkey', 'UAE', 'Malaysia', 'Spain', 'Monaco', 'Azerbaijan', 'Austria', 'Belgium', 'France', 'Germany', 'Hungary', 'Italy', 'UK' ) AND T3.year = 2010

question: Who finished second in the San Marino Grand Prix in 2006?
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.forename, T2.surname FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.position = 2 AND T1.raceId = 106 AND T1.year = 2006
gold_sql: SELECT T3.forename, T3.surname FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.year = 2006 AND T1.name = 'San Marino Grand Prix' AND T2.position = 2

question: For the race happened in 2015/11/29, how many drivers did not finish the game?
predicted_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.driverId) FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.date = '2015-11-29' AND T1.status = 'Retired'
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.driverId) FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId WHERE T1.date = '2015-11-29' AND T2.time IS NULL

question: For the driver who set the fastest lap speed, what is his nationality?
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.nationality FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId ORDER BY T1.fasterLapSpeed DESC LIMIT 1
gold_sql: SELECT T1.nationality FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId ORDER BY T2.fastestLapSpeed DESC LIMIT 1

question: Paul di Resta was in the No. 853 race, what percent faster did he finish in the 853rd race than the next race for the fastest lap speed?
predicted_sql: SELECT CAST((CAST(REPLACE(T1.fastestLapSpeed, ',', '') AS REAL) - CAST(REPLACE(T2.fastestLapSpeed, ',', '') AS REAL)) * 100 / CAST(REPLACE(T1.fastestLapSpeed, ',', '') AS REAL) AS REAL) FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 853 AND T2.forename = 'Paul' AND T2.surname = 'di Resta'
gold_sql: SELECT (SUM(IIF(T2.raceId = 853, T2.fastestLapSpeed, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T2.raceId = 854, T2.fastestLapSpeed, 0))) * 100 / SUM(IIF(T2.raceId = 853, T2.fastestLapSpeed, 0)) FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.forename = 'Paul' AND T1.surname = 'di Resta'

question: For the drivers who took part in the race in 1983/7/16, what's their race completion rate?
predicted_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.driverId) FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T2.time IS NULL AND T2.date = '1983-07-16'
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN T2.driverId END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.driverId) FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId WHERE T1.date = '1983-07-16'

question: How many seasons has Silverstone Circuit hosted the United Kindom grand prix?
predicted_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.year) FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN circuits AS T2 ON T1.circuitId = T2.circuitId WHERE T2.name = 'Silverstone' AND T1.country = 'United Kingdom'
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.circuitid) FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T1.name = 'Silverstone Circuit' AND T2.name = 'British Grand Prix'

question: Name the top 3 drivers and the points they scored in the 2017 Chinese Grand Prix.
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, T2.points FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T2.year = 2017 AND T2.circuitId = 12 AND T2.position = 1 LIMIT 3
gold_sql: SELECT T3.forename, T3.surname, T2.points FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN driverStandings AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' AND T1.year = 2017 ORDER BY T2.points DESC LIMIT 3

question: What is the best lap time recorded? List the driver and race with such recorded lap time.
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, T2.name FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId INNER JOIN lapTimes AS T3 ON T1.driverId = T3.driverId ORDER BY T3.milliseconds LIMIT 1
gold_sql: SELECT T2.milliseconds, T1.forename, T1.surname, T3.name FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN lapTimes AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId ORDER BY T2.milliseconds ASC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average lap time for Lewis Hamilton in the 2009 Malaysian Grand Prix?
predicted_sql: SELECT AVG(T2.milliseconds) FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId WHERE T1.forename = 'Lewis' AND T1.surname = 'Hamilton' AND T3.name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix' AND T2.year = 2009
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(T2.milliseconds) FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN lapTimes AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T3.forename = 'Lewis' AND T3.surname = 'Hamilton' AND T1.year = 2009 AND T1.name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix'

question: Indicate the full names of the top 10 players with the highest number of penalties.
predicted_sql: SELECT player_name FROM Player ORDER BY penalties DESC LIMIT 10
gold_sql: SELECT t2.player_name FROM Player_Attributes AS t1 INNER JOIN Player AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id ORDER BY t1.penalties DESC LIMIT 10

question: In Scotland Premier League, which away team won the most during the 2010 season?
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.team_long_name FROM League AS T1 INNER JOIN `Match` AS T2 ON T2.league_id = T1.id WHERE T1.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND T2.season = '2009/2010' AND T2.away_team_api_id = T2.home_team_api_id AND T2.away_team_goal - T2.home_team_goal > 0 GROUP BY T2.team_long_name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.away_team_api_id) DESC LIMIT 1
gold_sql: SELECT teamInfo.team_long_name FROM League AS leagueData INNER JOIN Match AS matchData ON leagueData.id = matchData.league_id INNER JOIN Team AS teamInfo ON matchData.away_team_api_id = teamInfo.team_api_id WHERE leagueData.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND matchData.season = '2009/2010' AND matchData.away_team_goal - matchData.home_team_goal > 0 GROUP BY matchData.away_team_api_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

question: At present, calculate for the player's age who have a sprint speed of no less than 97 between 2013 to 2015.
predicted_sql: SELECT player_name, DATE('2015-01-01') - birthday AS age FROM Player WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015' AND sprint_speed > 97
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT DATETIME() - T2.birthday age FROM Player_Attributes AS t1 INNER JOIN Player AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y',t1.`date`) >= '2013' AND STRFTIME('%Y',t1.`date`) <= '2015' AND t1.sprint_speed >= 97

question: What is the average height of players born between 1990 and 1995?
predicted_sql: SELECT AVG(T2.height) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.birthday BETWEEN '1990-01-01 00:00:00' AND '1995-12-31 23:59:59'
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(height) / COUNT(id) FROM Player WHERE SUBSTR(birthday, 1, 4) BETWEEN '1990' AND '1995'

question: Calculate the percentage of players who prefer left foot, who were born between 1987 and 1992.
predicted_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(player_fifa_api_id) FROM Player WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', birthday) BETWEEN '1987' AND '1992'
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN t2.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN t1.id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(t1.id) percent FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE SUBSTR(t1.birthday, 1, 4) BETWEEN '1987' AND '1992'

question: Find the average number of long-shot done by Ahmed Samir Farag.
predicted_sql: SELECT AVG(T2.long_shots) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.home_player_1 OR T2.away_player_1 WHERE T1.player_name = 'Ahmed Samir Farag'
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(t2.long_shots) AS REAL) / COUNT(t2.`date`) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.player_name = 'Ahmed Samir Farag'

question: List the top 10 players' names whose heights are above 180 in descending order of average heading accuracy.
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.player_name FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_fifa_api_id = T2.player_fifa_api_id WHERE T1.height > 180 ORDER BY SUM(T2.heading_accuracy) / COUNT(T2.player_fifa_api_id) DESC LIMIT 10
gold_sql: SELECT t1.player_name FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.height > 180 GROUP BY t1.id ORDER BY CAST(SUM(t2.heading_accuracy) AS REAL) / COUNT(t2.`player_fifa_api_id`) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Among all the players whose weight is under 130, how many of them preferred foot in attacking is left?
predicted_sql: SELECT COUNT(player_api_id) FROM Player_Attributes WHERE preferred_foot = 'left' AND weight < 130
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t1.id) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.weight < 130 AND t2.preferred_foot = 'left'

question: List out the account numbers of female clients who are oldest and has lowest average salary, calculate the gap between this lowest average salary with the highest average salary?
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.account_id FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' GROUP BY T1.account_id ORDER BY AVG(T1.A11) DESC LIMIT 1
gold_sql: SELECT T1.account_id , ( SELECT MAX(A11) - MIN(A11) FROM district ) FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN disp AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id INNER JOIN client AS T4 ON T3.client_id = T4.client_id WHERE T2.district_id = ( SELECT district_id FROM client WHERE gender = 'F' ORDER BY birth_date ASC LIMIT 1 ) ORDER BY T2.A11 DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the gender of the oldest client who opened his/her account in the highest average salary branch?
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.gender FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN account AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T2.A11 = ( SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district ) GROUP BY T1.gender ORDER BY T1.A11 DESC LIMIT 1
gold_sql: SELECT T2.gender FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id ORDER BY T1.A11 DESC, T2.birth_date ASC LIMIT 1

question: For the client whose loan was approved first in 1993/7/5, what is the increase rate of his/her account balance from 1993/3/22 to 1998/12/27?
predicted_sql: SELECT CAST((T1.balance - T2.balance) AS REAL) * 100 / T2.balance FROM trans AS T1 INNER JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T2.date BETWEEN '1993-07-05' AND '1998-12-27' AND T2.status = 'approved'
gold_sql: SELECT CAST((SUM(IIF(T3.date = '1998-12-27', T3.balance, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T3.date = '1993-03-22', T3.balance, 0))) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(IIF(T3.date = '1993-03-22', T3.balance, 0)) FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN trans AS T3 ON T3.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.date = '1993-07-05'

question: What is the percentage of loan amount that has been fully paid with no issue.
predicted_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.status = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.account_id) FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
gold_sql: SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'A' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100) / SUM(amount) FROM loan

question: Provide the account ID, district and region for loan amount greater than USD300,000.
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.account_id, T1.A2, T1.A3 FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.account_id WHERE T2.amount > 300000
gold_sql: SELECT T1.account_id, T2.A2, T2.A3 FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN loan AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T3.amount > 300000

question: How many posts does the user csgillespie own?
predicted_sql: SELECT COUNT(OwnerId) FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'csgillespie'
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'csgillespie'

question: Among the posts owned by csgillespie, how many of them are root posts?
predicted_sql: SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM posts WHERE ParentId IS NULL AND DisplayName = 'csgillespie'
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'csgillespie' AND T1.ParentId IS NULL

question: What is the average number of badges obtained by a user with over 200 views?
predicted_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.Id) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.DisplayName) FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.Views > 200
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.Id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.DisplayName) FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.Views > 200

question: Give the only one comment text of the post with parent id 107829.
predicted_sql: SELECT Text FROM postHistory WHERE ParentId = 107829
gold_sql: SELECT T2.Text FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN comments AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId WHERE T1.ParentId = 107829 AND T1.CommentCount = 1

question: Which user made a post titled 'Understanding what Dassault iSight is doing?' and how much is the reputation of the user?
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.DisplayName, T1.Reputation FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T2.Title = 'Understanding what Dassault iSight is doing?'
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DisplayName, T1.Reputation FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T2.Title = 'Understanding what Dassault iSight is doing?'
